displayTitle: Return of the Jedi: Max Rebo
synopsis:
**The 40th Anniversary Celebration of Return of the Jedi**

**Who Is Plotting to Kill Jabba the Hutt?**

Wait, someone else is plotting to kill one of the galaxy's most infamous gangsters? You better believe it! When you're Jabba the Hutt, you make a lot of enemies, and sometimes, they're even under your employ! Max Rebo and the band have their own plans on how to deal with a mobster like Jabba.

This issue bookends our Jabba's Palace one-shot and leads directly into the Return of the Jedi film!
title: Return of the Jedi: Max Rebo
